title: Outpatient Clinical Care for Adults
license_notes: Use as antibiotic-stewardship and outpatient-care source support. Do not use as a dosing policy.
supports: Outpatient respiratory infection guidance distinguishes pneumonia evaluation from uncomplicated viral cough syndromes.
Antibiotic decisions should be tied to the clinician's diagnosis and not generalized across viral respiratory syndromes.
Abnormal vital signs and focal lung findings raise concern for pneumonia rather than uncomplicated bronchitis.
